Package io.forja.components.feedbackAndStatus.fxBanner

Class FxBanner

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.Parent
javafx.scene.layout.Region
javafx.scene.layout.Pane
javafx.scene.layout.HBox
io.forja.components.feedbackAndStatus.fxBanner.FxBanner
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget
public class FxBanner extends javafx.scene.layout.HBox
A full-width top-of-page notice with an optional call-to-action button and a dismiss (×) icon.

FxBanner is a framed HBox carrying a leading icon (auto-selected per variant), the message FxLabel, an optional action FxButton, and an optional dismiss icon. Set setActionText(java.lang.String) + onAction to show the CTA.

Builder usage:

     
      FxBanner announce = FxBanner.builder()
          .variant(SemanticVariant.ACCENT)
          .message("Version 1.2 is available.")
          .actionText("Update")
          .onAction(e -> updater.start())
          .dismissible(true)
          .build();
See Also:
  • SemanticVariant
  • FxBanner.Builder
